title: Daily Memo: Belarusian Fertilizers, US-Japan Relations
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Belarusian rapprochement. The U.S. will remove sanctions on two key Belarusian fertilizer producers amid disruptions in global supplies related to the Iran war. The announcement came following Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko’s meeting on Thursday with a U.S. delegation led by special envoy John Cole. Washington will also lift sanctions on two Belarusian banks, Belinvestbank and […]

The post Daily Memo: Belarusian Fertilizers, US-Japan Relations appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Belarusian rapprochement. The U.S. will remove sanctions on two key Belarusian fertilizer producers amid disruptions in global supplies related to the Iran war. The announcement came following Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko’s meeting on Thursday with a U.S. delegation led by special envoy John Cole. Washington will also lift sanctions on two Belarusian banks, Belinvestbank and […]
